title: Gently Smoked French Pork Casserole
description: A roasted, creamy French dish featuring ground pork, smoked to perfection in a Dutch oven, suitable for a low-fat diet.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large Dutch oven, cook the ground pork over medium heat until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
Add the chopped onion and minced garlic to the pot and cook until the onion is translucent.
Stir in the smoked paprika and dried thyme and cook for 1 minute.
Add the heavy cream and grated cheese to the pot and stir until the cheese is melted and the mixture is smooth.
Season the mixture with salt and black pepper to taste.
Transfer the pot to the preheated oven and bake for 20 minutes.
Remove the pot from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
Cook pork to an internal temperature of 63°C / 145°F, then rest 3 minutes before serving.
